snp5.12:1.1: Hearing, hero, of one with no desire for sensuality,
snp5.12:1.3: I’ve come to ask the one gone beyond the flood, sensuality-free:
snp5.12:1.4: Tell me the state of peace, Blessed One, Simultaneous Eye.
snp5.12:1.5: Tell me as it actually is.
snp5.12:2.1: For the Blessed One lives having conquered sensuality,
snp5.12:2.2: as the radiant sun, in its radiance, the earth.
snp5.12:2.3: Limited my discernment, O Deeply Discerning.
snp5.12:2.4: Teach me to know the Dhamma,
snp5.12:2.5: the abandoning here of birth & aging.
snp5.12:3.4: Let there be nothing grasped or rejected by you.
snp5.12:4.3: If you don’t grasp at what’s in between,
snp5.12:5.4: by which he would go under Māra’s sway.
